Contact

Say hello

Have a question about the programme, want to know more, or just want to get in touch? We'd love to hear from you.

peerladder@elixiruknode.org

We aim to respond within a few working days.

PeerLadder

A peer-mentoring initiative empowering underrepresented digital Research Technical Professionals to step into leadership.
